Case Study • Various

How we helped Arrival Fashion in Bangladesh Achieves EcoVadis Bronze Medal with Growlity’s ESG Expertise

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Arrival Fashion, a leading garments and textile manufacturer in Dhaka, has earned the EcoVadis Bronze Medal 2025, a prestigious recognition for its sustainability performance. This milestone was achieved through ESG advisory and strategic support from Growlity, Inc. USA, a global leader in EcoVadis consulting and sustainability advisory services.

The EcoVadis Bronze Medal places Arrival Fashion in the top 35% of companies assessed globally by EcoVadis 2025, the world’s most trusted provider of business sustainability ratings. The assessment covered critical ESG criteria including Environment, Labor & Human Rights, Ethics, and Sustainable Procurement.

Strengthening Sustainable Supply Chains

Growlity was running a large-scale Sustainable Procurement Program for a European retail major, aimed at enhancing ESG performance across its vendor partners in India and Bangladesh. As one of the top garment manufacturers and exporters from Bangladesh to this retailer, Arrival Fashion was selected to undergo an EcoVadis assessment as part of the program.

Growlity began its partnership with Arrival Fashion in September 2024, offering full-spectrum EcoVadis support services, from ESG gap assessment, document preparation, and policy alignment to performance tracking. The assessment was successfully completed in a short period, showcasing Growlity’s efficiency and commitment to driving sustainability in global supply chains.

Silver Medal Recognition Boosts Global Visibility

Growlity was running a large-scale Sustainable Procurement Program for a European retail major, aimed at enhancing ESG performance across its vendor partners in India and Bangladesh. As one of the top garment manufacturers and exporters from Bangladesh to this retailer, Arrival Fashion was selected to undergo an EcoVadis assessment as part of the program.

Growlity began its partnership with Arrival Fashion in September 2024, offering full-spectrum EcoVadis support services—from ESG gap assessment, document preparation, and policy alignment to performance tracking. The assessment was successfully completed in a short period, showcasing Growlity’s efficiency and commitment to driving sustainability in global supply chains.

Leading the Way in Sustainable Garment Manufacturing

This recognition not only highlights Arrival Fashion’s commitment to responsible garment manufacturing in Bangladesh, but also strengthens its credibility with international buyers seeking ESG-compliant partners. The achievement adds to Arrival Fashion’s growing reputation in the sustainable textile industry.

With the support of Growlity’s proven expertise in EcoVadis readiness, Arrival Fashion is now better positioned to enhance transparency, attract sustainability-focused clients, and continue its growth in the sustainable fashion sector.

About Arrival Fashion

Arrival Fashion, based in Dhaka, is a growing name in sustainable garment manufacturing in Bangladesh, known for quality exports and ethical business practices. The company aims to lead by example in the textile industry by integrating ESG principles and contributing to a low-carbon, transparent supply chain.

About Growlity, Inc. USA

Growlity is a globally recognized sustainability consulting firm, providing businesses across 25+ countries with expert services in ESG disclosure, EcoVadis readiness, responsible sourcing, climate strategy, and supply chain sustainability. Growlity empowers businesses to achieve sustainability goals and improve their EcoVadis score through strategic consulting.
